dimensions.name: task_relevance
dimensions.note: The context pack is centered on notification after approval.

dimensions.name: required_object_coverage
dimensions.note: Notification delivery, workflow transition, scoped token, audit constraint and duplicate-notification risk are included.

dimensions.name: required_relation_coverage
dimensions.note: The included relations preserve dependency, evidence, blocking and generation paths needed for the task.

dimensions.name: evidence_preservation
dimensions.note: All source evidence referenced by included objects and relations is preserved.

dimensions.name: risk_and_blocker_visibility
dimensions.note: The audit-before-notify constraint and duplicate notification risk remain visible.

dimensions.name: governance_gate_visibility
dimensions.note: The package has no explicit governance gate object; the safety constraint is visible but not modeled as a gate.

dimensions.name: no_private_or_unsafe_leakage
dimensions.note: The package is synthetic and contains no private material.

important_omissions.note: The scoped API token feature and source evidence are included, so the omitted package wrapper does not block this task.

limitations: The review is performed on a synthetic package.
The review does not measure downstream implementation quality.
The package does not yet model governance gates as graph objects.
Selection scores are heuristic and do not prove semantic completeness.
claim_supported: The generated context pack preserved task-relevant meaning under this review protocol.
